purpose: reduce adjacent density jumps before pressure simulation or prototype preparation

rules.max_adjacent_density_jump_pct_note: Configured engineering threshold (static); smoothing enforces this on final density_pct values.

smoothing_method.name: bounded_neighbor_average
smoothing_method.description: If adjacent density jump exceeds limit, adjust current density toward previous smoothed zone within allowed jump limit.
smoothing_method.density_range_note: raw_density_pct (input/original density) may exceed a profile ceiling before clamp/smoothing in upstream generation; density_in_allowed_range checks apply to final density_pct after clamp/smoothing.
